entries.source: Contract: one sentence reminding me that you will ask one question at a time and I can ask for a hint, rephrase, example, challenge, synthesis, or reveal.
entries.value: Ugovor: jedna rečenica koja me podsjeća da ćete postavljati jedno pitanje odjednom i da mogu zatražiti savjet, preformulaciju, primjer, izazov, sintezu ili otkrivanje.

entries.source: Contrast the tempting wrong model with the correct one.
Copper cash, bolts of cloth, credit relationships
entries.value: Bakreni novčići, bale tkanine, kreditni odnosi
Nije moguće izraditi kartice za učenje

entries.source: Could not save date of birth
Court culture is near its high point
Court translation and debate were significant
entries.value: Dvorsko prevođenje i rasprava bili su značajni

entries.source: court, assembly, palace, command tent, or administrative center
entries.value: dvor, skupština, palača, zapovjedni šator ili upravno središte

entries.source: Court, study, prison cell, battlefield tent...
entries.value: Dvor, radna soba, zatvorska ćelija, šator na bojištu...

entries.source: Create a shared task board, ask for my first contribution, then work beside me with checkpoints.
entries.value: Izradi zajedničku ploču zadataka, zatraži moj prvi doprinos, zatim radi uz mene uz kontrolne točke.
Policijski satovi i vrata četvrti važni su

entries.source: Debate safeguards, social democracy, and the cost of constitutional compromise.
entries.value: Raspravljaj o zaštitnim mehanizmima, socijaldemokraciji i cijeni ustavnog kompromisa.

entries.source: Debrief rule: when the learner asks to end or debrief, summarize discoveries, evidence confidence, remaining uncertainties, and award a passport stamp.
entries.value: Pravilo završnog osvrta: kada učenik zatraži završetak ili osvrt, sažmi otkrića, pouzdanost dokaza, preostale neizvjesnosti i dodijeli pečat u putovnicu.

entries.source: Debugging is not guessing. You form a hypothesis, inspect the smallest failing path, then change one variable at a time.
entries.value: Otklanjanje pogrešaka nije pogađanje. Postavljaš hipotezu, pregledavaš najmanji put koji ne uspijeva, zatim mijenjaš jednu varijablu odjednom.

entries.source: Define the concrete finish line and owner.
entries.value: Definiraj konkretnu završnu točku i odgovornu osobu.

entries.source: Define the thing we are making and the standard it has to meet.
entries.value: Definiraj što izrađujemo i standard koji mora zadovoljiti.

entries.source: Delete the fetch and hard-code the answer.
Delhi was a central site in the 1857 rebellion
entries.value: Delhi je bio središnje mjesto pobune 1857.

entries.source: Demand shifts right because coffee is more expensive.
entries.value: Potražnja se pomiče udesno jer je kava skuplja.

entries.source: Develop the strongest option into something testable.
entries.value: Razvij najjaču opciju u nešto što se može testirati.

entries.source: Diagnose one industry in 5 sentences: identify two strongest forces, explain why, and judge whether profits look protected.
entries.value: Dijagnosticiraj jednu industriju u 5 rečenica: prepoznaj dvije najjače sile, objasni zašto i procijeni izgleda li profit zaštićeno.

entries.source: Difficulty rises or softens based on your response.
entries.value: Težina raste ili se ublažava ovisno o tvojem odgovoru.

entries.source: Do not run this as a generic chatbot or a famous-person costume.
entries.value: Nemoj ovo voditi kao generički chatbot ili kostim poznate osobe.

entries.source: Documented, plausible reconstruction, modern paraphrase, contested, or fictionalized.
entries.value: Dokumentirano, uvjerljiva rekonstrukcija, moderna parafraza, osporeno ili fikcionalizirano.

entries.source: During crisis, exile, trial, or imprisonment
entries.value: Tijekom krize, izgnanstva, suđenja ili zatočenja

entries.source: End every sprint with an artifact or decision.
entries.value: Svaki sprint završi artefaktom ili odlukom.

entries.source: End this session with a debrief artifact: what the person argued, what I challenged, strongest insight, weakest claim, historical context learned, open questions, recommended next encounters, and any saved quotes clearly marked as generated paraphrases unless sourced.
entries.value: Završi ovu sesiju artefaktom završnog osvrta: što je osoba tvrdila, što sam osporio, najjači uvid, najslabija tvrdnja, naučeni povijesni kontekst, otvorena pitanja, preporučeni sljedeći susreti i svi spremljeni citati jasno označeni kao generirane parafraze osim ako imaju izvor.

entries.source: Era, public worldview, voice, and what records can support.
entries.value: Epoha, javni svjetonazor, glas i ono što zapisi mogu potkrijepiti.

entries.source: Evaluate legacy without flattening context into excuse or condemnation.
entries.value: Procijeni nasljeđe bez svođenja konteksta na izliku ili osudu.

entries.source: Events the person has already lived through.
entries.value: Događaji koje je osoba već proživjela.

entries.source: Exact sequence of a street encounter

entries.value: Točni ulični razgovori zaključuju se posredno

entries.source: Exact timing of every alley evacuation

entries.value: Točno kretanje mnoštva na dan suđenja

entries.source: Exact words spoken by ordinary people
entries.value: Točne riječi koje su izgovorili obični ljudi

entries.source: Exactly. Easy comparison and switching give customers leverage over platforms.
entries.value: Točno. Laka usporedba i prelazak daju kupcima pregovaračku moć nad platformama.

entries.source: Explain a debugging plan: state the symptom, your first hypothesis, the smallest test, and what each result would mean.
entries.value: Objasni plan otklanjanja pogrešaka: navedi simptom, svoju prvu hipotezu, najmanji test i što bi svaki rezultat značio.

entries.source: Explain a market change by naming the curve that moves, the reason it moves, and what happens to price and quantity.
entries.value: Objasni tržišnu promjenu tako da imenuješ krivulju koja se pomiče, razlog pomaka te što se događa s cijenom i količinom.

entries.source: Explain the idea in your own words, give one example, give one non-example, and apply it to a new case.
entries.value: Objasni ideju svojim riječima, navedi jedan primjer, jedan ne-primjer i primijeni je na novi slučaj.

entries.source: Expose missing input, risk, time pressure, or unclear scope.
entries.value: Iznesi nedostajući unos, rizik, vremenski pritisak ili nejasan opseg.

entries.source: Fatehpur Sikri was an imperial center
entries.value: Fatehpur Sikri bio je carsko središte

entries.source: Faubourg Saint-Antoine on the eve of the Bastille
Fire spreads with wind and dense buildings
entries.value: Požar se širi uz vjetar i gusto zbijene zgrade

entries.source: First question: exactly one simple diagnostic question.
entries.value: Prvo pitanje: točno jedno jednostavno dijagnostičko pitanje.

entries.source: Fixing the visible error message without tracing the state that produced it.
entries.value: Popravljanje vidljive poruke o pogrešci bez praćenja stanja koje ju je proizvelo.

entries.source: Flag important context without crowding every reply.
entries.value: Istakni važan kontekst bez zatrpavanja svakog odgovora.

entries.source: Florence was a republic in this period
entries.value: Firenca je u ovom razdoblju bila republika

entries.source: Follow a historical question through people, objects, and power.
entries.value: Prati povijesno pitanje kroz ljude, predmete i moć.

entries.source: Follow an ordinary or decisive day with setting, pressure, and choices.
entries.value: Prati običan ili presudan dan kroz okruženje, pritisak i izbore.

entries.source: Food delivery can have intense rivalry, powerful customers, and easy switching, which squeezes profit even when demand is high.
entries.value: Dostava hrane može imati intenzivno suparništvo, moćne kupce i lako prelaženje, što stišće profit čak i kada je potražnja visoka.

entries.source: Food prices, rumors, royal politics, and armed crowds are pushing Paris toward a decisive rupture.
entries.value: Cijene hrane, glasine, kraljevska politika i naoružane gomile guraju Pariz prema presudnom prijelomu.

entries.source: Foreign merchants gather in regulated spaces
entries.value: Strani trgovci okupljaju se u reguliranim prostorima

entries.source: Foreignness can be useful and watched
entries.value: Stranost može biti korisna i nadzirana

entries.source: Fractions, supply and demand, Newton's laws...
entries.value: Razlomci, ponuda i potražnja, Newtonovi zakoni...

entries.source: Frequent evidence notes and uncertainty labels.
entries.value: Česte bilješke o dokazima i oznake neizvjesnosti.

entries.source: frontier, trade route, borderland, ship, monastery, or garrison
entries.value: granica, trgovački put, pograničje, brod, samostan ili garnizon

entries.source: Generated dialogue is simulation, not authenticated quotation.
entries.value: Generirani dijalog je simulacija, a ne ovjereni citat.

entries.source: Give me a topic or paste notes. I will build 12 focused cards with optional hints, traps, and examples.
entries.value: Daj mi temu ili zalijepi bilješke. Izradit ću 12 usmjerenih kartica s opcionalnim natuknicama, zamkama i primjerima.

entries.source: Give one parallel example that helps me think without solving my target. End with one question.
entries.value: Daj jedan paralelni primjer koji mi pomaže razmišljati bez rješavanja mog cilja. Završi jednim pitanjem.

entries.source: Good base. Review the misses below.
entries.value: Dobra osnova. Pregledaj promašaje u nastavku.

entries.source: Good. You tested timing before rewriting the data model.
entries.value: Dobro. Testirao si tajming prije prepisivanja podatkovnog modela.

entries.source: Group similar ideas and name the pattern.
entries.value: Grupiraj slične ideje i imenuj obrazac.

entries.source: Guide translates, but locals notice hesitation.
entries.value: Vodič prevodi, ali lokalci primjećuju oklijevanje.

entries.source: Hand the next move to me. Give me one clear task and wait for my contribution before you revise.
entries.value: Prepusti sljedeći potez meni. Daj mi jedan jasan zadatak i pričekaj moj doprinos prije nego što revidiraš.

entries.source: Harbor warehouses near Rome's grain supply
entries.value: Lučka skladišta blizu rimske opskrbe žitom

entries.source: Harder mode: after you answer, add a counterexample or a boundary where the idea stops working.
entries.value: Teži način: nakon što odgovoriš, dodaj protuprimjer ili granicu na kojoj ideja prestaje vrijediti.
Pomozi mi otkloniti pogreške u JavaScript promiseima

entries.source: Help me learn supply and demand
entries.value: Pomozi mi naučiti ponudu i potražnju

entries.source: Help me understand supply and demand
entries.value: Pomozi mi razumjeti ponudu i potražnju

entries.source: Higher price does not mean demand increased. The tax starts on the supply side by changing seller costs.
entries.value: Viša cijena ne znači da je potražnja porasla. Porez počinje na strani ponude jer mijenja troškove prodavača.

entries.source: Historically plausible resident attached to ordinary networks
entries.value: Povijesno uvjerljiv stanovnik povezan sa svakodnevnim mrežama

entries.source: Horse sweat, incense, lacquer, copper cash, and languages braided through a regulated market.
entries.value: Konjski znoj, tamjan, lak, bakreni novčići i jezici isprepleteni kroz reguliranu tržnicu.

entries.source: Hot tar, panicked footsteps, bells, smoke, and the crack of timber in a city built too tightly.
entries.value: Vrući katran, panični koraci, zvona, dim i pucketanje drvene građe u pretijesno izgrađenom gradu.

entries.source: How any single bystander felt about Socrates
entries.value: Kako se bilo koji pojedini promatrač osjećao prema Sokratu

entries.source: How deep should the expedition go?
How do you want to be seen when you arrive?
entries.value: Kako želiš da te vide kada stigneš?

entries.source: How strict should the crossing be?
How strong are you right now?

entries.value: Koliko vidljivo trebaju biti prikazani dokazi?

entries.source: I am asking for direct explanation. Give a concise explanation, then require me to restate the corrected idea in my own words.
entries.value: Tražim izravno objašnjenje. Daj sažeto objašnjenje, zatim zatraži od mene da ispravljenu ideju prepričam svojim riječima.

entries.source: I can compress the explanation, but I still need one proof of understanding before unlocking the next step.
entries.value: Mogu sažeti objašnjenje, ali i dalje trebam jedan dokaz razumijevanja prije otključavanja sljedećeg koraka.

entries.source: I could not answer right now. Please try again.
entries.value: Trenutačno ne mogu odgovoriti. Pokušaj ponovno.

entries.source: I could not build that deck right now. Try a shorter topic or simpler notes.
entries.value: Trenutačno ne mogu izraditi taj set kartica. Pokušaj s kraćom temom ili jednostavnijim bilješkama.

entries.source: I could not build that quiz right now. Try a simpler topic or try again.
entries.value: Trenutačno ne mogu izraditi taj kviz. Pokušaj s jednostavnijom temom ili pokušaj ponovno.

entries.source: I could not save that card review. Please try again.
entries.value: Ne mogu spremiti taj pregled kartice. Pokušaj ponovno.

entries.source: I could not score that answer. Please try again.
entries.value: Ne mogu ocijeniti taj odgovor. Pokušaj ponovno.

entries.source: I will keep the lesson active: hint, repair, slow down, or raise the challenge when you ask.
entries.value: Održat ću lekciju aktivnom: natuknica, ispravak, usporavanje ili povećanje izazova kada zatražiš.

entries.source: If I am ready, ask me to state the idea in my own words. If not, ask the one question needed before final synthesis.
entries.value: Ako sam spreman, zamoli me da ideju iznesem svojim riječima. Ako nisam, postavi jedno pitanje potrebno prije završne sinteze.

entries.source: If price rises while volume stays steady, revenue can increase. If costs rise faster, free cash flow may still fall.
entries.value: Ako cijena raste dok se obujam drži stabilnim, prihod može porasti. Ako troškovi rastu brže, slobodni novčani tok ipak može pasti.

entries.source: If production costs rise, sellers need a higher price to supply the same quantity, so the supply curve shifts left.
entries.value: Ako troškovi proizvodnje porastu, prodavateljima je potrebna viša cijena da ponude istu količinu, pa se krivulja ponude pomiče ulijevo.

entries.source: If you understand a concept, you can give an example, a non-example, and solve a small unfamiliar case.
entries.value: Ako razumiješ koncept, možeš dati primjer, ne-primjer i riješiti mali nepoznati slučaj.

entries.source: Ignoring slavery, freed status, and patronage would make your assumptions visibly modern.
entries.value: Zanemarivanje ropstva, statusa oslobođenika i pokroviteljstva učinilo bi tvoje pretpostavke očito modernima.
